evidence.snippet: Axiom Materials, Inc. is a leading manufacturer of advanced composite materials, specializing in ceramic matrix composites (CMCs), prepregs, honeycomb core, film adhesives, and ancillary composite products. Our mission is to deliver high-quality materials with exceptional customer service and innovative design.

Honeycomb Core
--------------
Axiom manufactures Aerospace and Commercial Grade Nomex® Honeycomb to suit most aerospace and commercial applications.

items.notes: Sells honeycomb cores (Nomex®, Kraft paper), composite prepregs (epoxy, BMI, phenolic, CMC), and film adhesives — raw structural material inputs used in airframe manufacturing.

products_categories.notes: Axiom is an advanced composite materials manufacturer selling structural raw materials (prepregs, honeycomb, adhesives) across aerospace, military, automotive, industrial, and other markets. No other UXV-specific product categories observed.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Axiom sells structural materials (honeycomb cores, composite prepregs, film adhesives) that go into drone/UAV airframe construction. The rubric explicitly includes 'materials' in the component_supplier definition. Broadly aerospace/industrial with no UXV-specific product line.

products.notes: Several product detail pages were skipped (aerospace-grade Nomex honeycomb, ceramic matrix composites detail, composite prepregs detail). Additional product SKUs likely exist.

evidence.snippet: Axiom operates 10 equipment lines to produce woven fabric prepregs, unidirectional tapes, honeycomb core, and thin film adhesives. All lines are automated with SPC controls to manufacture high quality materials consistently.

Axiom Materials, Inc. is proudly AS9100D and ISO 9001:2015 certified, ensuring the highest standards in our operations. Since being acquired by KORDSA in 2019, we have continued to expand our capabilities and reach.

readiness.notes: 5 manufacturing facilities in Southern California, 10 automated production equipment lines, AS9100D/ISO9001:2015 certified, standard catalog products with published specifications.

tagline: Manufactures aerospace-grade and commercial honeycomb cores (Nomex®, kraft), composite prepregs (carbon, aramid, fiberglass, ceramic matrix composite), and film adhesives for aerospace, defense, and industrial markets. Production-ready across Southern California facilities. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no major defense contracts identified in public record.
